hibernate-mapping.query: select c.LegalName,eu.EmployeeName, pu.PaycheckDate,pu.CheckNumber,b.BillDate, c.SourceCompanyId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c , com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Bill as b join b.PaycheckUsageSet as pu join pu.EmployeeUsage as eu join eu.UsagePeriod as up join up.CompanyUsage as cu where cu.LicenseId=:licenseId and b.BillDate=:billDate and cu.SourceCompanyId=c.SourceCompanyId and cu.SourceSystemCd=c.SourceSystemCd order by c.LegalName,eu.EmployeeName,pu.PaycheckDate

select c.LegalName,eu.EmployeeName, pu.PaycheckDate,pu.CheckNumber,b.BillDate,c.SourceCompanyId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c , com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Bill as b join b.PaycheckUsageSet as pu join pu.EmployeeUsage as eu join eu.UsagePeriod as up join up.CompanyUsage as cu where b.Id=:billId and cu.SourceCompanyId = c.SourceCompanyId and cu.SourceSystemCd = c.SourceSystemCd order by c.LegalName,eu.EmployeeName,pu.PaycheckDate
